positive: A minimalist, high-contrast illustration of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) in a dynamic, ethereal pose. The fox should be rendered with stylized fur textures and dramatic flowing tails, framed by geometric astral elements like crescent moons, constellations, and nebula bursts. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep indigo, metallic gold, and creamy ivory. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco symmetry and contemporary sacred geometry, ensuring sharp edges and clean silhouettes perfect for apparel printing. Central composition, designed to fill the frame powerfully. Studio lighting, vector art quality, highly detailed line work.
